title: eleogiton fluitans
intro: Eleogiton fluitans, also known as Water Buttercup, is a floating aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Eleogiton fluitans can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various ailments.
